title: Summer Research Intern - Computer Vision Lab
description: We seek a summer research intern to work on deep learning for computer vision. Strong Python and PyTorch skills required. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis until positions are filled.

title: Research Assistant - NLP Group
description: Join our NLP group working on large language models. Experience with transformers and Python preferred. Apply by December 1, 2026.

title: Backend Engineer Intern
description: Build scalable backend services in Python and Go. Experience with SQL, Docker, and Kubernetes a plus. Application deadline: end of quarter.

title: Backend Engineer Intern (Remote)
description: Backend services in Python and Go at Acme. SQL and Docker required. Deadline end of quarter.

title: AI Research Fellowship
description: A one-year fellowship for early-career researchers in machine learning. Statement of purpose required. Applications close within 7 days of announcement.

title: TreeHacks 2026 Hackathon
description: 36-hour hackathon. Build with JavaScript, React, and Python. Team registration closes two weeks before demo day.

title: Graduate Research Grant
description: Funding for graduate research in data science and machine learning. Proposal required. Submit by 2026-09-30.

title: GSoC: Open-Source LLM Tooling
description: Contribute to open-source LLM tooling in Python. Good first issues available. Proposal deadline April 2, 2026.

title: Data Scientist (Entry Level)
description: Entry-level data scientist role. Python, SQL, and machine learning required. Rolling applications.

title: Student Travel Grant - ML Conference
description: Travel grants for students presenting ML research. Submit your request by November 15, 2026.
